summary: A beginner-friendly guide to Runx covering what it is, how to get started, and why it matters for agent developers.
audience: Developers interested in agent tooling, AI safety, and portable skills.
why_allowed: Hosted in a public GitHub repository, accessible to anyone without authentication. The content is original, non-promotional, and provides educational value about the Runx project.

observations.content: The guide explains Runx core concepts: governed execution, portable skills, and receipts.
Links to the official Runx repository.
Includes getting started steps: install CLI, init, init, implement, test, publish.
Provides resources: official docs, GitHub repo, example skills.
